en: Hoppers made me feel all of the emotions on the spectrum.
ko: Hoppers는 온갖 감정을 느끼게 해줬어. 정말 정말 행복하고, 향수를 느끼고, 그냥
ja: Hoppersはあらゆる感情を味わわせてくれた。すごく幸せで、懐かしくて、
zhTW: Hoppers讓我感受到了各種情緒。非常非常開心、懷舊、而且
vi: Hoppers da khien toi cam nhan moi cam xuc. Thuc su rat vui, hoai niem, va

en: Really, really happy. Nostalgic, and just made me feel warm on the inside.
ko: Hoppers는 온갖 감정을 느끼게 해줬어. 정말 정말 행복하고, 향수를 느끼고, 그냥
vi: khien toi cam thay am ap ben trong.

en: Very sentimental. Mabel, it was just one person, and it just kind of made me feel like maybe I could do anything.
ja: とても感傷的。メイベル、たった一人だったけど、何でもできるかもしれないと思わせてくれた。
zhTW: 很感性。Mabel，雖然只有一個人，但讓我覺得也許我什麼都能做到。
vi: Rat xuc dong. Mabel, chi co mot nguoi, nhung khien toi cam thay co le toi co the lam bat cu dieu gi.
